untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a custom ratio calculation (true_range / ATR[60]) over N days where N is undefined (AUTHOR_SILENT). The allowed indicator set does not include a pre-computed N-day true range sum or ratio metric. Additionally, the ATR period should be 60 but only atr_7, atr_14, atr_20 are available. The lag parameter and ndays parameter are not specified (AUTHOR_SILENT), making the exact lookback window indeterminable. This requires custom formula support not available in standard indicator library.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using available ATR (atr_14 as proxy for atr_60) and true_range, but the core ratio calculation and N-day aggregation logic cannot be accurately represented with allowed indicators and operators. Signal is context-dependent with no clear directional bias. Exit condition was AUTHOR_SILENT, so a reversal condition (ratio declining below ATR) was inferred.
